display.label: CloudEvents serializer type
display.description: Specify a serializer to serialize CloudEvents values Default: json

display.label: CloudEvents data serializer type
display.description: Specify a serializer to serialize the data field of CloudEvents values Default: json

display.label: Enable OpenTelemetry tracing attributes
display.description: Specify whether to include OpenTelemetry tracing attributes to a cloud event Default: false

display.label: Enable extension attributes
display.description: Specify whether to include extension attributes to a cloud event Default: true

display.label: Schema name adjustment mode
display.description: Specify how schema names should be adjusted for compatibility with the message converter used by the connector, including:'avro' replaces the characters that cannot be used in the Avro type name with underscore (default)'none' does not apply any adjustment Default: avro

display.label: CloudEvents schema name
display.description: Specify CloudEvents schema name under which the schema is registered in a Schema Registry

display.label: Enable schema data name from header
display.description: Specify whether CloudEvents.data schema name can be retrieved from the header Default: false

display.label: Metadata source
display.description: Specify from where to retrieve metadata Default: value,id:generate,type:generate,traceparent:header,dataSchemaName:generate
